authority: This file is the single source of truth for numbers (GR-1). No metric appears in prose except as a citation of this file. Keystone-only writes.

objective.gate: tools/lexon_check.mjs full pass on every proposed LEXICON entry, plus 5 held-out census terms expressed by the assayer using only the proposal's pattern recipe, plus 3 covered regression entries; gateResult 8/8 (T5: zero collapses). Regime: spec-checker (real Lexon compiler is macOS-only, source unpublished; see SOURCES.md lexon-compiler-status).
objective.hardConstraint: every entry cites a SOURCES.md slug (GR-9 trace-or-delete); register discipline proven/conjectured/speculative never upgraded; no em dashes in artifact/; no C-series numbers or confidence percentages from any seat (GR-3)

baseline.how: node tools/census.mjs --freeze (rule pinned in artifact/CENSUS.json and tools/census.mjs EXCLUSIONS); coverage-debt re-derived by node tools/coverage.mjs against artifact/LEXICON.lexon.md

best.evidence: run lexr3 2026-07-11 (wf_591d34aa-988, status INCOMPLETE: round 1 complete, round 2 lost to session-limit outage at the Gap seats, engine reported outage not exhaustion, nothing folded from it): 3 levers VALIDATED 8/8, 0 MIRAGE, all critic-classed structural, FIRST RUN UNDER THE MUTATION-HARDENED GATE: every proposal entry and every held-out carried a relation claim and returned RELATION PASS (all four claim types exercised by pt-primitive-polarity-charter). Keystone fold 2026-07-11: 17 unique proposal entries (cross-lever collisions T-208 and T-044 arbitrated one-expression-per-censusId) + 12 assayer-authored held-out entries (T-038 deduped to the spell proposal; T-105 and T-192 REFUSED per the critic scope-inflation flag: invented roles not in the canon terms), all 29 re-verified GATE PASS + RELATION PASS at fold. node tools/coverage.mjs = 123, 88 covered, 0 failed. First spell-grammar lever (promise-bundle-spell) validated; SG-1..SG-6 conventions folded into artifact/SPELL_GRAMMAR.md. Prior best 152 by lexr2 fold (chronicles/2026-07-11_lexr2_fold.md). Verdicts in runs/lexr3/lexr3.1/*/ and the engine record.

openTarget.statement: the constitutional layer as spells (lexr3.1 critic nextLead): aim the validated promise-bundle-spell recipe at the harness's OWN constitution: TRUSTS T1-T6 and the seven seat cards as Lexon promise bundles with relation claims, targeting artifact/SPELL_GRAMMAR.md proper. T1 decomposes directly (protection/delegation as may/must clauses, authorization as the recital shared root); the T2 separation promise is an absence claim (the claim type the round under-exercised); T6 door = a gate no seat may self-declare. Terms are behavior-shaped by construction, closing the scope-inflation hole. Bind claim-type diversity into the round (the critic: gate claims are the cheapest twins; force ordering/conjunction/absence in held-outs). OT-4 (spell-grammar lens under the hardened gate) MET by lexr3: promise-bundle-spell VALIDATED 8/8 structural, SG-1..SG-6 folded, coverage-debt 152 to 123, all 29 fold entries RELATION PASS. This is the direct construction of the operator result: lexon your own dual agents.
